description: SmartCustomer is a consumer review and ratings platform where people can research businesses, read and write reviews, and browse categories and discovery content. It also provides business tools for managing reviews and related customer interactions.
summary: SmartCustomer exposes a business-facing HTTP API at `https://api.smartcustomer.com/v2` authenticated by an API key, plus a public MCP server at `https://chatgpt.smartcustomer.com/mcp` with no auth.
